chinese_text:
籊籊竹竿，以釣于淇，豈不爾思，遠莫致之。
泉源在左，淇水在右，女子有行，遠兄弟父母。
淇水在右，泉源在左，巧笑之瑳，佩玉之儺。
淇水滺滺，檜楫松舟，駕言出遊，以寫我憂。

2 The Tsceuen-yuen is on the left,
And the waters of the Kce are on the right.
But when a young lady goes away, [and is married],
She leaves her brothers and parents.

How shine the white teeth through the artful smiles !

There are the oars of cedar

and the boats of pine,
carriage and ramble,

2 There are the leaves of the sparrow-gourd； —
There is that lad with the archers thimble at his girdle.
Though he carries an archer^ thimble at his girdle,

How easy and conceited is his manner,
